billing.title: Billing & Subscription
billing.cancel_confirm_description: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the billing period. You'll still have access to your credits.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage end-to-end encryption and device trust settings
security.encryption_disabled_description: Enable end-to-end encryption to secure your data. A certificate will be generated and you'll need to store it securely.
security.encryption_enabled_description: Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Keep your certificate safe.
security.key_loaded: Encryption key is loaded on this device
security.key_loaded_description: You can access encrypted data from this device.
security.key_required_description: Please upload your certificate to access encrypted data on this device.
security.device_trusted_description: This device is trusted. Your encryption key will remain stored even after logout.
security.device_not_trusted_description: This device is not trusted. Your encryption key will be removed when you logout.
security.step_1_description: A certificate containing a public and private key pair is generated in your browser. The public key is stored on our servers, while the private key stays with you.
security.step_2_description: The private key is encrypted and stored in your browser's secure storage. You can download the certificate as a backup.
security.step_3_description: Choose whether to keep the encryption key on this device after logout. Untrusted devices will require you to upload your certificate again.
security.tip_description: Send your certificate to yourself by email or store it in a secure location. You'll need it to access your encrypted data from new devices.

newTranscription.title: New Transcription
newTranscription.subtitle: Upload audio files to create a new transcription
newTranscription.dragDrop: Drag & drop audio files here, or click to browse
newTranscription.supportedFormats: Supported formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC (max 500MB per file)
newTranscription.languageHelper: Select the language spoken in the audio
newTranscription.speakersHelper: How many different people are speaking?
newTranscription.vocabularyHelper: Add specific words or terms separated by commas (e.g., technical terms, names, acronyms)
newTranscription.insufficientCredits: Insufficient credits. Please upgrade your plan.
